Bash(node -e 'const s=require\("./data/scores/scores.json"\); console.log\("generatedAt:", s.generatedAt\); console.log\("hasData:", s.hasData\); console.log\("leaderboard rows:", s.leaderboard.length\); console.log\("shows:"\); for \(const [n, sh] of Object.entries\(s.shows\)\) console.log\("  show", n, "→", sh.showDate, "| scored:", sh.scored, "| status:", sh.fetchStatus, "| url:", sh.phishNetUrl\); console.log\("\\nSample prediction object \(should have NO actual song titles\):"\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(s.leaderboard[0].byShow["1"].predictions[0], null, 2\)\);')
